rationale: Counts may decrease (debt paydown is welcome). Counts MUST NOT increase (regression). Periodic threshold ratchets reduce these numbers as debt is paid down. The ratchet gate itself enforces the no-increase invariant in CI; threshold updates are conscious decisions captured in this file with a 'ratcheted_at' note.

boundary_violations_max.rationale: Structural overlay-architecture boundary violations. Tolerated indefinitely per v1.0.0 Key Decision (AF-7). Tracked here so CI can detect regression-via-increase.

upstream_compat_diffs_max.rationale: Branding-caused test differences when running upstream test suite against composed dist/. Tolerated indefinitely per v1.0.0 Key Decision (AF-7). Tracked here so CI can detect regression-via-increase.

ratchet_history.note: SSOT baseline committed. Consumer (check-debt-ratchet.cjs + CI step) lands in Wave 1.6 Task 1.6-04.
